overview: AlphaConverge is a stock-market convergence intelligence engine. It scores US equities across six independent signal categories — technical structure, fundamental inflection, market microstructure, sentiment, macro/sector alignment, and lifecycle stage — and surfaces a ranked list of high-conviction setups only when multiple categories align. Each surfaced ticker produces a plain-language 'Play' with a stage classification, a recommended instrument (LEAP, near-term call, cash-secured put, DCA, or pass), and a fatigue warning when the setup is early.
features: Convergence engine scoring six independent signal categories per ticker
Ranked screener that surfaces only setups where 4+ categories align
Lifecycle stage classification: capitulation, base, breakout, early trend
Play card with instrument recommendation matched to the stage
Plain-language thesis and 'too early' fatigue warnings
Per-category signal breakdown on each ticker detail view
